metadata.source: Zotero MinerU ZIP assets extracted from four core fulltext sources
metadata.note: Images are inserted as real Markdown image paths. Captions are paraphrased from MinerU/PDF figure captions and bound to draft claims.

records.body_section: 3 弯曲成形中的基本受力状态
records.caption: 数控绕弯过程示意，用于说明弯曲模、夹模、压力模和管材共同建立弯曲变形区。
records.source_caption: Figure 1. Schematic diagram of tube NC bending.

records.caption: 数控弯曲中的截面畸变与壁厚减薄示意，用于支撑外侧减薄和截面形状变化的耦合讨论。
records.source_caption: Figure 2: Cross section deformation and wall thinning of tube NC bending.

records.caption: 硬芯棒类型示意，用于说明圆柱芯棒和球头芯棒支撑范围不同。
records.source_caption: Figure 6: Types of the hard mandrel.

records.caption: 管材绕弯工模具三维模型，用于说明弯曲模、防皱板、芯棒和管材之间的接触边界。
records.source_caption: 图 1 管材绕弯成形工模具三维模型.

records.caption: 三维自由弯曲 U-R 曲线及截面畸变率对比，用于说明摩擦参与曲率形成和截面质量变化。
records.source_caption: Fig. 8 U-R curves and comparison of section distortion rates.
